◎简　　介  

　　Enter the twisted and surreal world of Interment - where nothing is as it seems and no one is safe. Writer/director Sean Murray delivers this blood soaked tragedy which will leave you uneasy and disturbed. Detective Charlie Osmond (Bill Marsh) is in pursuit of a ruthless serial killer known as Scott (Louis Devito). What Osmond encounters along the trail pushes him over the edge...
